Plan by Season

The Perfect Time
for Every Traveller

Konkan transforms dramatically with seasons. Each time of year offers something truly special — pick what excites you most.

🌧️
June – September
Monsoon Magic
The Konkan transforms into a lush paradise. Every hillside is emerald green, streams overflow, and waterfalls roar to life. Perfect for nature lovers and those who love the drama of rain.
🌊 Waterfalls🌿 Green Trails💧 Streams🌧️ Rain Walks
🌤️
October – February
Winter Bliss
Ideal weather — clear skies, gentle breeze, perfect for beach walks, fort treks, and snorkeling. The most popular season with families and groups. All activities fully open.
🏖️ Beaches🏰 Forts🐠 Snorkeling🚤 Boat Rides
☀️
March – May
Mango & Beaches
The season of Alphonso mangoes! Visit orchards, enjoy fresh seafood, and explore quiet beaches before the crowds arrive. Hot but rewarding for the adventurous.
🥭 Mango Tours🐟 Seafood🌅 Sunsets🏄 Surfing

*Indicative launch prices: final pricing depends on travel dates, group size, room category, pickup point and selected activities. Prices assume local destination pickup; Mumbai/Pune transport can be added to your quote. Scuba, boating and entry fees are included only when specifically confirmed.
Booking Made Simple

Not sure which package fits?

Share your dates, number of travellers and budget. A local trip planner will recommend the right route and send a clear WhatsApp quote.

Build My Custom Trip →
Can every package be customised?

Yes. You can change destinations, number of nights, hotel category, meals, pickup point and activities.

Is Mumbai or Pune pickup available?

Yes. Private vehicle or group transport can be quoted separately based on your dates and group size.

Are scuba and water sports included?

They are optional unless the final written quote specifically lists them as included. Activities depend on sea and weather conditions.

How do I confirm a booking?

Send an enquiry on WhatsApp. After availability and inclusions are confirmed, you will receive the final itinerary and payment details.

Why Choose Us

We Are Local.
That Makes All the Difference.

We grew up on this coast. We know the secret spots, the best eateries, and the hidden trails that no travel agency will tell you about.

🏡
100% Local Guides
Our guides were born and raised in Konkan. We know every hidden beach, shortcut, and local secret — things no guidebook will tell you.
💰
Affordable Packages
No middlemen, no inflated prices. We work directly with local stays and transport to get you the best value for your budget.
🗺️
Personalised Plans
No cookie-cutter tours. We plan each trip based on your group size, interests, season, and budget. Every itinerary is unique.
🌿
Season-Smart Advice
Monsoon, winter or summer — we know exactly what's best to do and what to avoid each season to make your trip perfect.
📱
WhatsApp Support
Plan, book, and get support entirely on WhatsApp. We're available to help you before, during, and after your trip.
⭐
4.9 Star Rated
Over 500 families have explored Konkan with us. Our reviews speak for themselves — happy travellers are our biggest achievement.
